title: Kevin Crouthers
extract: Kevin Crouthers (born 3 January 1976) is a former professional rugby league footballer who played in the 1990s and 2000s. He played at club level for the Dewsbury Rams (two spells), the Bradford Bulls, the Wakefield Trinity Wildcats, the London Broncos, Doncaster, the Warrington Wolves, Chorley Lynx, and the Batley Bulldogs, as a fullback, wing, centre, or loose forward.
